utterances.text: Okay, main thing today is closing out the Q3 marketing budget. Finance came back and approved forty thousand dollars, which is five thousand less than we asked for.
That works if we cut the podcast sponsorship. I'd rather protect the conference booth at San Diego since that drove most of last quarter's pipeline.
Agreed, drop the podcast for now. Second thing: launch date. Engineering wants to move the launch from August 30 to September 12 to get the migration tool finished.
September 12 is fine by marketing, but Priya needs final copy two weeks before, so August 29 at the latest. I'll own getting her the draft by August 22.
Good. Last one, the hiring req. We got headcount for one senior designer. Marcus will post the role on Monday and we want a shortlist by the end of the month.
One more thing — legal still hasn't cleared the new trademark. I'll ping them again tomorrow so it doesn't block the launch page.
